div.h1: Batch Operation Efficiency: Vector Ingestion Pipeline

p.strong: Technical Specification: M6 Query API Optimization
p.em: Comparison of Naive O(N) vs. Optimized O(1) Amortized Insertion

div.p: Implementation Reference: The BatchWriter struct utilizes a non-blocking TryLock on the M1 segment. If locked, vectors are buffered in a L3-cache-aligned staging area (Ring Buffer) before a single memcpy flush.

ul.li: Context Switches: 2 * N (User <-> Kernel) for Mutex
I/O Pattern: Random 512B writes; high IOPS overhead
Amortized Locking: 1 Lock Acquisition for N vectors
Throughput: Sequential I/O saturates NVMe bandwidth
Efficiency: Parallel validation via CPU vector units

g.title: Heavy contention point for concurrent writers
Heavy contention point for concurrent writers
